title: T-005 — Drizzle schema: schedule_outputs (planning projection) + wo_dependencies + wo_status_history
prompt:
Add Drizzle pgTable definitions for `schedule_outputs`, `wo_dependencies`, `wo_status_history` per PRD §5.8 + §5.9 + §5.11.

## Canonical wo_outputs ownership (2026-05-14 decision)
08-PRODUCTION T-003 is the canonical owner of `wo_outputs` (production-runtime shape: batch_number, qa_status, V-PROD-24, catch_weight_details, allergen cascade, R13 audit). Planning side does NOT create `wo_outputs` — it creates a planning-time projection table `schedule_outputs` that the production-side materializer projects into `wo_outputs` on WO start.

## schedule_outputs (planning projection)
Columns:
- id UUID PK
- org_id UUID NOT NULL (Wave0 v4.3 lock — never tenant_id)
- planned_wo_id UUID FK work_orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
- product_id UUID FK
- output_role enum ('primary'|'co_product'|'byproduct')
- expected_qty NUMERIC(12,3) NOT NULL
- uom TEXT NOT NULL
- allocation_pct DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL
- disposition enum ('to_stock'|'direct_continue'|'pending_decision') DEFAULT 'to_stock'
- downstream_wo_id UUID FK work_orders(id) NULL
- notes TEXT NULL
- created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
- updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()

Indexes: partial-unique `schedule_outputs_one_primary_per_wo` on (org_id, planned_wo_id) WHERE output_role='primary'; index `idx_schedule_outputs_planned_wo` (planned_wo_id); partial index `idx_schedule_outputs_downstream` (downstream_wo_id) WHERE downstream_wo_id IS NOT NULL.

## wo_dependencies (DAG edges)
id, org_id, parent_wo_id FK, child_wo_id FK, material_link FK (wo_materials), required_qty, created_at. UNIQUE(org_id, parent_wo_id, child_wo_id). Cycle prevention is service-layer (DFS topo sort) — DB only enforces UNIQUE.

## wo_status_history
wo_id, from_status, to_status, action, user_id, override_reason TEXT, timestamp, context_jsonb. History rows are permanent; never delete on WO delete.

## RLS
RLS on all three tables via `app.current_org_id()` foundation function (Wave0 decision; see `_meta/audits/2026-05-14-tenant-context-remediation.md`). Policy `<table>_org_context` USING (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) WITH CHECK (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`). ENABLE + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY. Never `current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id')` GUC.

## Materialization contract
On WO start event (consumed by 08-production T-003 materializer / T-001 runtime preflight), the planning-side `schedule_outputs` rows are projected into the canonical `wo_outputs` table owned by 08-production. Production-only columns (batch_number, qa_status, V-PROD-24, catch_weight_details, allergen cascade, R13 audit) are populated by 08-production at materialization time and never by planning.

Generate migration `0005_planning_schedule_outputs_dag.sql`. RED test asserts partial-unique primary constraint, UNIQUE on dependencies, pg_policies references `app.current_org_id()` and contains no GUC reads, and that no `wo_outputs` table is created by this migration.

pipeline_inputs.description: Schema for schedule_outputs (planning projection of primary/co/byproduct), wo_dependencies (DAG edges), wo_status_history. Planning-side outputs use schedule_outputs; canonical wo_outputs is owned by 08-production T-003 per 2026-05-14 decision.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cycle prevention is service-layer (DFS topo sort) — DB only enforces UNIQUE(org_id, parent_wo_id, child_wo_id) per §5.9. Partial unique index `schedule_outputs_one_primary_per_wo` on (org_id, planned_wo_id) WHERE output_role='primary'. allocation_pct sum check = 100% deferred to service layer (V-PLAN-WO-004 — warn, not block by default). disposition default 'to_stock' (per §14.1, P1 enforces only to_stock). RLS uses foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (Wave0 decision; see `_meta/audits/2026-05-14-tenant-context-remediation.md`). Materialization into canonical `wo_outputs` (owned by 08-production T-003) happens on WO start; planning never writes to `wo_outputs`.
out_of_scope: Canonical wo_outputs table — owned by 08-production T-003 (do not create here)
Materialization projection schedule_outputs → wo_outputs on WO start (owned by 08-production)
acceptance_criteria: Given the schema loads, when introspected, then schedule_outputs + wo_dependencies + wo_status_history export expected columns including the 3 enums, with org_id NOT NULL on each.

Given the migration is generated, when grepped, then partial-unique on (org_id, planned_wo_id) WHERE output_role='primary' exists AND no `wo_outputs` table is created (canonical wo_outputs owned by 08-production T-003).

Given `pg_policies` is inspected, when policies for schedule_outputs/wo_dependencies/wo_status_history are listed, then the qual/withcheck reference `app.current_org_id()` and contain no `current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id')` GUC reads.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/schedule_outputs_dag.test.ts` and `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when run, then 0 failures and no type errors.
test_strategy: RED test asserts presence of partial-unique primary index on schedule_outputs, UNIQUE dependency edge constraint, pg_policies referencing app.current_org_id(), and absence of any `wo_outputs` table in this migration.
risk_red_lines: Do NOT create `wo_outputs` table — that table is owned by 08-production T-003 (canonical per 2026-05-14 decision). Planning side uses `schedule_outputs` (this task) and materializes into `wo_outputs` on WO start via 08-production logic.
Do not read current_setting('app.tenant_id') or current_setting('app.current_org_id') directly — use the foundation app.current_org_id() function so the NULL-safe setter contract is preserved.
Do not use tenant_id as the business-scope column; per Wave0 v4.3 lock it is org_id. See _meta/audits/2026-05-14-tenant-context-remediation.md.
Do not enforce cycle-free at DB layer — performance-prohibitive on insert.
Do not delete wo_status_history rows on WO delete — history is permanent.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Canonical wo_outputs owner (production-runtime shape: batch_number, qa_status, V-PROD-24, catch_weight_details, allergen cascade, R13 audit). Planning emits schedule_outputs; 08-production T-003 materializes into wo_outputs on WO start (2026-05-14 decision).
Scanner consumes released WO/material reservation contracts and produces execution events.
